settings.heading: Shipping
settings.content: Orders are processed within 2-3 business days. A tracking link is emailed the moment your order ships. Worldwide shipping; duties and taxes are calculated at checkout.

settings.heading: Size & Fit
settings.content: Cut with a relaxed, boxy fit and a dropped shoulder. If you prefer a closer fit, size down. Full per-size measurements are added soon.

settings.question: How does the fit run?
settings.answer: Relaxed and true to size. Prefer it closer? Size down one.

settings.question: How fast does it ship?
settings.answer: Orders process in 2-3 business days, with tracking emailed at dispatch.

settings.question: Can I return it?
settings.answer: Yes - unworn pieces within 14 days. Message us and we'll handle it.
